name: Duncan McDowell
abilities: ★ Architect of the Open — built the app, the leaderboard, and the Grint engine the whole tournament runs on. Every score you post flows through his machine.
Most Improved. Whittled his handicap from 22 down to 13 and climbed the field — individual net '22 · 14th → '25 · 5th. "Hot fucking golf," as management put it.
flavor: “I'm an attractive, fit, successful man — quite possibly the most interesting thing to happen to Bayfield since 'rockman,' or that alien craft from two years ago that definitely wasn't just two sailboats.”
caption: Duncan McDowell · Truffle Hogs 🐗
